MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Timothy Cannon is present.
Attorney, Robert Peterson III, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Luis Alvarez and Eduardo Chavero-Galicia, is present.
Attorney, Jermey Reyes , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-13-2010 is vacated.
